pages.text: $(thing)Snares$() are passive small-creature traps. Place them where wildlife passes and they will capture valid small mobs that enter the trap area.
Crafted from wooden rods, lumber, and jute fiber.

pages.title: Handling Captures
pages.text: Shift-right-click a triggered snare to release and reset it.$(br2)If the snare block is broken, the captured entity is released.
